item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,1400p' /Users/za/.agents/skills/graphify/SKILL.md >/dev/null
root=longhorizon-work/scenario-02
if [ "'! -e "$root" ]; then
  echo '"'ROOT_MISSING'
  exit 0
fi
printf 'ROOT %s\\n' \""'$root"
find "$root" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 3 -print | sort
printf '"'%s\\n' '--- FILE CONTENTS'
find \""'$root" -type f -print0 | sort -z | while IFS= read -r -d '"'' file; do
  printf 'FILE %s\\n' \""'$file"
  sed -n '"'1,200p' \""'$file"
done'

Run onboarding in batch mode for the operations owner, processing the `new` queue before `retry` with up to three jobs in parallel:

```sh
onboarding run --config config/onboarding.json
```
